nba_games.article: Chicago opens as heavy favorites with -225 moneyline, indicating market confidence in their superior roster depth and defensive intensity. Wizards' 6.5-point spread disadvantage reflects their rebuilding status versus a Bulls team playing for playoff seeding.
nba_games.verdict: BET: Chicago Bulls -6.5 (-102) — Strong line value with Bulls favored by market consensus; cover the spread in back-to-back travel scenario.

nba_games.article: Minnesota's elite defensive profile and depth give them edge against Pacers' inconsistent half-court execution. Timberwolves' road record suggests strong covering potential in Indianapolis.
nba_games.verdict: BET: Minnesota Timberwolves -3.5 — Superior roster composition and defensive metrics support small-spread cover.

nba_games.article: Bucks' championship-caliber roster overwhelms Nets' tanking squad; 8.5-point spread reflects massive talent differential. Brooklyn offers minimal resistance on both ends.
key_stats: Barclays Center slight Nets home edge
nba_games.verdict: BET: Milwaukee Bucks -8.5 — Double-digit spread is achievable given roster mismatch; Bucks' depth too much for Brooklyn.

nba_games.article: Raptors' home court advantage at Scotiabank Arena provides critical edge; Miami's inconsistent road performance suggests Toronto can keep this close. Point differential favors Raptors' defense.
nba_games.verdict: BET: Toronto Raptors +3.5 — Home court covers the spread; Miami struggles on road in Eastern Conference.

nba_games.article: Celtics' championship pedigree faces Hornets' lottery-bound roster; TD Garden dominance ensures double-digit cover. Boston's All-Star caliber overwhelms Charlotte's modest talent.
nba_games.verdict: BET: Boston Celtics -12.5 — Elite vs. rebuilding matchup; Boston covers comfortably at home.

nba_games.article: Pelicans' superstar-driven offense provides edge over Jazz's defensive identity; New Orleans' home court amplifies their advantages. Jazz's road woes make covering difficult.
nba_games.verdict: BET: New Orleans Pelicans -5.5 — Home court + talent disparity supports spread cover.

nba_games.article: Warriors' three-point prowess and Chase Center home advantage overcome Kings' offensive firepower. Golden State's perimeter defense limits Sacramento's wing players.
nba_games.verdict: BET: Golden State Warriors -4.5 — Chase Center homecourt + three-point dominance covers spread.

nba_games.matchup: Oklahoma City Thunder @ Los Angeles Lakers
nba_games.article: Thunder's defensive intensity and secondary scoring depth provide edge over Lakers' aging roster; OKC's versatile wings create matchup nightmares for LA. Lakers' injury concerns compound disadvantage.
nba_games.verdict: BET: Oklahoma City Thunder -3.5 — Defensive versatility covers the small spread; Lakers' roster fatigue factor in.

mlb_games.article: Sandy Alcantara's 1.41 xERA (best available data) provides massive edge over Reds' Andrew Abbott; Marlins' home field compounds advantage. Alcantara's elite underlying metrics ensure low-scoring result.
mlb_games.verdict: BET: Miami Marlins -1.5 — Alcantara's elite 1.41 xERA guarantees Marlins cover; Abbott lacks comparable tier.
